is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of P. falciparum isolates from Cameroonian patients treated with sulfadoxine-pyrimethamine.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Table 2 reports DHFR residues 51, 59, 108 and DHPS residues 436, 437, 540, 581, 613 — all curated target codons.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Only 6 individual isolates are genotyped in Table 2 (individual sequences, not aggregate frequencies). Provides genotype per patient rather than numerator/denominator frequencies per locus for a population.

sub_country_location.evidence: Patients residing in Yaoundé, Cameroon; samples collected at Nlongkak Catholic Missionary Dispensary — a sub-national site.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: No collection year or window is stated anywhere in the paper (received 1998); no usable collection date given.

african_field_samples.evidence: Ten Cameroonian adult patients residing in Yaoundé, Cameroon — human field/clinical isolates from an African country.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary empirical clinical study with treatment follow-up and DNA sequencing.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Small standalone clinical study in Yaoundé; references a companion baseline study (ref 5) but this is a distinct in-vivo cohort.

supplement.evidence: No supplementary tables referenced; all data in main text tables.

assessment.summary: Small in-vivo SP resistance study of 6 Cameroonian adult P. falciparum isolates from Yaoundé, reporting individual DHFR (51,59,108) and DHPS (436,437,540,581,613) genotypes correlated with treatment outcome. Reports per-patient genotypes rather than aggregate locus frequencies, and gives no collection date.
exclusion_reasons: No extractable population-level per-locus frequencies (only 6 individual isolate genotypes in Table 2)
No collection year or time window stated, so temporal resolution cannot be established
